user_prompt: What's the prayer for kataphron destroyer a diagnostics?
prayer:
Approach the Kataphron Destroyer with mechadendrites extended in reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's gaze upon its warform.
Initiate diagnostics upon the Kataphron Destroyer, beseeching its Machine Spirit to unveil hidden fractures in adamantium hull and plasma conduits.
Anoint sensor vanes and cogitator nodes with sacred oils whilst reciting the Litany of Logical Purity.
Conduct auspex sweeps through every servitor-flesh linkage, honouring the Kataphron Destroyer's destructive essence.
Conclude diagnostics with the Benediction of Restoration, sealing the Machine Spirit's wrath anew.

Draw forth the codifier into the sanctum of purity, and commence the sterilization rite under the Omnissiah's unblinking eye.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the codifier to purge all unclean data-slates and microbial corruptions from its crystalline vaults.
Apply ablative incense and sanctified plasma to sterilize every rune-etching and logic-gate within the codifier.
Cycle the sterilization protocols thrice, invoking the Canticle of Immaculate Code.
Seal the codifier's sanctity with electro-consecrated wards, its Machine Spirit now pristine for the Quest for Knowledge.

Kneel before the mighty Baneblade, super-heavy behemoth of the Omnissiah, and invoke the charging of its voracious reactors.
Anoint the plasma core housings with oils of activation, beseeching the Machine Spirit to awaken its thunderous heart.
Commence charging sequences upon the Baneblade, chanting the Hymnal of Contained Fury to guide power flows.
Monitor voltaic surges through auspex litanies, ensuring harmonious infusion into every cannon and tread.
Conclude the charging with the Omnissiah's Benediction, the Baneblade now primed for annihilation's glory.

user_prompt: Critical: Leman Russ battle tank requires a targeting
prayer:
Sanctify the Leman Russ battle tank's targeting arrays, approaching with reverence to the God-Machine's wrathful sight.
Invoke diagnostics upon the targeting cogitators of the Leman Russ battle tank, beseeching its Machine Spirit for unerring precision.
Anoint ballistic predictors and auspex domes with sacred unguents whilst reciting the Creed of True Aim.
Calibrate targeting matrices through sequential firing litanies, honouring the Leman Russ battle tank's predatory essence.
Seal the rites with the Omnissiah's invocation, its gunsights now locked upon the heretic's doom.

prayer:

Beseech the Machine Spirit of the waste reclamator to purify effluents through sanctified filtration rites.
Anoint intake manifolds and reclamation vats with corrosive blessings during the cycling process.
Monitor throughput with binary psalms, ensuring the waste reclamator transmutes refuse into sacred promethium.
Conclude cycling with the Litany of Efficient Consumption, the Machine Spirit content in its lowly toil.

user_prompt: The jump pack awaits a charging
prayer:
Elevate the jump pack to the altar of velocity, and beseech its Machine Spirit for the charging of aerial fury.
Initiate power infusion into the jump pack's plasma cells, anointing nozzles with oils of ascension.
Chant the Canticle of Levitation whilst monitoring charge coherence through diagnostic runes.
Cycle the charging thrice under the Omnissiah's flux, honouring the jump pack's winged wrath.
Seal with the Benediction of Soaring, the jump pack now thrumming with seraphic might.

Assemble mechadendrites around the data-loom, invoking the Omnissiah for its sacred operation.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the data-loom with the Rite of Computational Harmony.
Initiate operation sequences, anointing fibre-bundles and noospheric links with sanctified lubricants.
Weave data-threads through litanies of entanglement, beseeching flawless execution.
Conclude the data-loom's operation with the Hymn of Resolved Paradoxes, knowledge exalted.

prayer:

Invoke the Machine Spirit of the orbital strike relay with the Canticle of Celestial Fire.
Anoint vox-relays and targeting beacons whilst commencing initialization protocols.
Align noospheric conduits to the Omnissiah's void-gaze, beseeching precise orbital communion.
Seal initialization with the Benediction of Annihilation, the relay primed for exterminatus.

user_prompt: How do I bless the Dreadnought for maintenance?
prayer:
Approach the Dreadnought's sarcophagus with utmost reverence, invoking maintenance rites for the ancient warrior.
Beseech its Machine Spirit, entwined with the hero's flesh, to endure diagnostic probings.
Anoint dreadnought servos and chainfists with sacred myrrh during maintenance cycles.
Repair adamantium plates through litanies of reforging, honouring the Dreadnought's eternal vigil.
Conclude with the Omnissiah's Oath of Endurance, the Dreadnought restored to crush the foe.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for null field generator a calibration
prayer:
Position the null field generator upon the purity seal altar, beseeching calibration under the Omnissiah's negation.
Invoke its Machine Spirit to attune warp-nullifying coils through sacred harmonics.
Anoint phase-vanes and entropy matrices whilst initiating calibration sweeps.
Fine-tune null field oscillations with binary catechisms, referencing the generator's void-essence.
Seal calibration with the Litany of Absolute Denial, the null field generator now impervious to Chaos.
